extortion.description: Aura Engineering solves problems. For nearly 30 years, we’ve provided efficient and reliable solutions to customers in the chemical and petrochemical industries. Our skilled team of system designers customizes each project to your specifications. No matter your engineering challenge, our experienced and knowledgeable staff is ready for the task. Aura Engineering, LLC was established in 1996 with the goal of providing professional engineering and design services to the petrochemical, chemical, and storage terminal industries.
